title: dolichos helvolus
intro: Dolichos helvolus, a flowering plant species, is a type of legume that belongs to the pea family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolichos helvolus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune system function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
